And heal the earth which the angels have defiled, and announce the healing of the earth that I will heal it, and that not all the sons of men shall be destroyed through the mystery of all the things which the watchers have spoken and have taught their sons.

And heal the earth which the angels have defiled, and announce the healing of the earth that I will heal it, and that not all the sons of men shall be destroyed through the mystery of all the things which the watchers have spoken and have taught their sons.

sign in

Prepare To
Move

Get Early Access

Unlock a world of web3 possibilities with your Genopet. Join a community of 300k+.

Invites sent weekly.

Email

Summon Your

Digital Pet

Your Genopet is a digital representation of you—infused with your personality. Take care of your Genopet by taking care of yourself. As you evolve⁠, it evolves.

Start Moving

to play

Running at the gym or walking in the park? Your Genopet is always by your side—growing and evolving with you. All steps. All day. No GPS required.

Your Steps Fuel

your journey

Bank your steps each day to convert your activity into Energy you’ll use throughout the game. The key to getting ahead is staying consistent. Steps to Energy to Rewards.

Enter The

genoverse

nurture

Your Genopet can get moody. Feed and play daily to keep your Genopet happy.

battle

Hone your skills and compete for glory. Challenge your friends in turn-based gameplay.

create

Your pet’s future is in your hands. Craft NFTs to upgrade and customize your Genopet.

Earn

rewards

Trade Genopets and in-game NFTs in the marketplace to reap the rewards of your gameplay. Acquire a Habitat for your Genopet to earn KI Tokens daily. Move-to-Earn Gaming.

roadmap

phase 1 [complete]

Private Beta

  • The goal of PHASE 01 is to test summoning Genopets and tracking steps with an intimate cohort of players.

  • Players can now:

  • • Acquire Genesis Genopets & Habitats
  • • Summon Baby Genopets & Evolve
  • • Bank Steps & Set Personal Goals
  • • Convert Energy & Level Up with XP
  • • See their Rank on the Leaderboard
  • • Trade on NFT Marketplace Partners
  • • Stake GENE & Earn KI Tokens
  • • Manage, Rent, and Terraform Habitats
  • • Refine Crystals & Get Terraform Seeds
  • • Convert Energy to KI Token with a Habitat

phase 2 [in progress]

Whitelist Public Beta

  • The goal of PHASE 02 is to expand the size of the player base while introducing core gameplay mechanics.

  • Players will be able to:

  • • Craft Items, Augments, & Power-Ups
  • • Play Nurture Minigames - Feed, Fetch, & Pet
  • • Refer Friends with Invite Codes
  • • Complete Challenges & Earn Achievements
  • • Augment & Customize Genopets
  • • Battle in Turn-Based PVP Minigames
  • • Use Advanced Motion Tracking & Wearables

phase 3 [coming 2023]

Future Launch

  • The goal of PHASE 03 is to allow players to connect in- game and explore the Genoverse together.

  • Players will be able to:

  • • Explore the Open World of Genopets
  • • Experience an Epic Story with Quests
  • • Engage in Multiplayer & Team Battles
  • • Craft & Terraform in App
  • • Connect with Additional Health Sensors
  • • Join Seasonal Challenges to Unlock Augments

secure your spot today

Join a community of over 300,000 Genovians around the world, exploring the Genoverse together one step at a time. Space is limited. Invites sent weekly.
